summary: OSS auth refactor backend testing complete. All 32 tests pass across auth (login/register/me/forgot/reset/change/profile), Google OAuth stubs, RBAC (super admin protections, publish restrictions), articles (public list + education gating), uploads (auth-required, disk persistence, content-type validation), and seed verification.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1000 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, articles, admin, uploads) for maintainability.
JWT_SECRET has a weak default fallback; ensure production sets it (already noted in .env comment).
reset_password does not invalidate previous reset tokens after use (JWTs remain valid until exp). Consider single-use token via DB tracking.
/api/files/{path} download endpoint is public — acceptable for images but should not be used for private uploads without ACL.
must_change_password flag is cleared on reset-password/change-password but not enforced anywhere in middleware; frontend must handle this UX.
test_credentials: Super admin nfinansarastirma@gmail.com / Admin123! — verified working; restored/never mutated in shared session.
seed_data_creation: Test-only users are created per-run with unique emails (test_user_*, reset_*, cp_* prefixes). Not cleaned up but do not affect subsequent runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow is JWT Bearer only (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Do NOT use /api/auth/session (removed). Super admin creds: nfinansarastirma@gmail.com / Admin123!. Education gating uses category slug 'egitim'. There's currently one edu article slug 'opsiyon-101-greeks-delta-gamma-theta-vega-nedir'. dev_reset_url is returned by /api/auth/forgot-password when SMTP is not configured (current state). GOOGLE_ENABLED=false in current env.
